test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.registers users and routing-queues datasets

test-case.description: runs users dataset with nextUri paging and normalized output
test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.runs users dataset with nextUri paging and normalized output

test-case.description: runs routing-queues dataset and normalizes records
test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.runs routing-queues dataset and normalizes records

test-case.description: runs catalog-defined dataset that is not explicitly registered
test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.runs catalog-defined dataset that is not explicitly registered

test-case.description: applies endpoint defaultQueryParams to route and query values for generic datasets
test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.applies endpoint defaultQueryParams to route and query values for generic datasets

test-case.description: applies DatasetParameters.Query overrides for generic datasets
test-case.name: Additional dataset implementations.applies DatasetParameters.Query overrides for generic datasets

test-case.description: runs submit->poll->results flow and writes audit outputs
test-case.name: Audit logs dataset.runs submit->poll->results flow and writes audit outputs

test-case.description: supports dataset parameter overrides for interval, service names, and actions
test-case.name: Audit logs dataset.supports dataset parameter overrides for interval, service names, and actions

test-case.description: fails when transaction reaches FAILED terminal state
test-case.name: Audit logs dataset.fails when transaction reaches FAILED terminal state

test-case.description: fails when transaction reaches CANCELLED terminal state
test-case.name: Audit logs dataset.fails when transaction reaches CANCELLED terminal state
